debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
⊢ @CategoryInContext.Category.split_mono α C Y X f ↔ ∀ (c : α), Function.Surjective fun g => comp g f

failed_attempts:
constructor
  · intro hf c
    rcases hf with ⟨g, hg⟩
    intro h
    refine ⟨h ≫ g, ?_⟩
    calc
      (h ≫ g) ≫ f = h ≫ (g ≫ f) := by simp [assoc]
      _ = h ≫ id X := by simp [Category.IsSection, hg]
      _ = h := by simp [id_comp]
  · intro h
    have hs : Function.Surjective (fun g : Hom X X => g ≫ f) := h X
    rcases hs (id X) with ⟨g, hg⟩
    refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
    simpa [Category.IsSection, comp_id] using hg

constructor
  · rintro ⟨g, hg⟩ c
    refine ⟨fun h => h ≫ g, ?_⟩
    intro h
    have : f ≫ g = id X := hg
    simpa [Category.comp_assoc, this, Category.comp_id] using congrArg (fun t => h ≫ t) this
  · intro h
    have hs : Function.Surjective (fun g : Hom X X => g ≫ f) := h X
    rcases hs (id X) with ⟨g, hg⟩
    refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
    simpa [Category.id_comp] using hg.symm
